salary_details.details: Rs.33,000 per month + House Rent Allowance = Rs.42,900

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TANUVAS Project Associate-IIB recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-IIB post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be graduates or postgraduates in Veterinary Sciences, Microbiology, Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, or related disciplines from a recognized university. Knowledge in specific techniques is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years for the Project Associate-IIB position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-IIB role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive Rs. 33,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance, totaling Rs. 42,900 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TANUVAS Project Associate-IIB position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their bio-data/application via email to the specified address, mentioning "Application for Project Associate IIb" in the subject line.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an interview. Shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at the Bioinformatics Centre, Madras Veterinary College, Chennai 600007.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Associate-IIB.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job opportunity at TANUVAS.
